name: Pop-up Mesh Hamper - Brightroom™
description:
Gather your laundry in one spot with the Pop-up Mesh Hamper from Brightroom™. This mesh hamper is designed with an open top and features a mesh design. Made with soft and lightweight fabric, this hamper comes with double handles for easy lifting and carrying around spaces in your home.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
